narrative:
Cols 64-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,035 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.8 percentage points.
